channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Zelenskyy says NATO offer for Ukraine-controlled territory could end 'hot stage' of war
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — An offer of NATO membership to territory under Kyiv’s control would end “the hot stage of the war” in Ukraine, but any proposal to join the military alliance should be extended to all parts of the country that fall under internationally recognized borders, President Volodymyr Ze
item.dc:creator: SUSIE BLANN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Missing hiker survived 50 days in Canadian wilderness, at times in frigid temps
item.description: A 20-year-old hiker who had been missing for weeks was found alive in the wilderness of British Columbia, the Royal Canadian Mountain Police confirmed on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Unger, KRON4

item.title: Credit card debt is soaring – what to know about getting out of it
item.description: With credit card debt reaching an all-time high, now is the time for the most pertinent questions and answers surrounding a difficult reality many Americans are facing.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, KREX 5

item.title: Earl Holliman, 'The Rainmaker' and 'Twilight Zone' actor, dead at 96
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - Award-winning actor Earl Holliman has died at the age of 96, according to multiple reports. Holliman died Monday in hospice care at his home in Studio City according to his spouse, Craig Curtis, who told The Hollywood Reporter.
item.dc:creator: Nick Jachim, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears fire coach Matt Eberflus after skid marked by poor decisions late in games
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Matt Eberflus was fired by the Chicago Bears on Friday, one day after botching a timeout in a loss at Detroit. Offensive coordinator Thomas Brown will serve as interim coach, the Bears said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers extend contract of postseason hero
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers have agreed to a contract extension with one of the key pieces of the team's World Series title run. The Dodgers reached agreement Friday on a deal with Tommy Edman, ensuring that the do-it-all utility-man will remain with the team for the foreseeable future.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: US-based model, husband and child kidnapped and held 12 hours after leaving restaurant in Brazil: reports
item.description: A Brazilian model who lives in the U.S. was kidnapped along with her husband and child in her home country this week and held captive for 12 hours.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: These food chains are offering deals for Black Friday
item.description: Black Friday extends beyond retail shopping. To kick off the holiday shopping season, many restaurant chains and food brands are serving up deals beginning on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Amazon worker strike: 5 things to know
item.description: The strike, dubbed "Make Amazon Pay," has planned demonstrations in more than 20 countries including the United States, and the protests are slated to last through Cyber Monday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KRON4

item.title: Mexico's congress votes to charge cruise ship passengers $42 per head for port calls
item.description: Cruise ship industry players are up in arms after the lower house of Mexico’s Congress voted this week to charge a $42 immigration levy for every passenger on cruise ships that dock in Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cucumbers sold in 26 states recalled over Salmonella concerns
item.description: A produce company based in Arizona is recalling whole cucumbers that were distributed in more than two dozen states and Canada due to Salmonella concerns.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, NewsNation

item.title: Venezuelan gang members linked to violent apartment takeover arrested in New York City
item.description: Tren de Aragua members Denyeer Aramillo Meneses, 23, and Edison Pena Angulo, 25, were arrested in the Bronx. Both were pictured in a viral video of a Colorado armed break in.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sniper kills Florida man who fired 200 rounds at neighboring condos
item.description: A Florida man was killed by a Volusia Sheriff's Office sniper after he reportedly fired more than 200 rounds at neighboring condos over several hours on Thanksgiving morning, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, NewsNation

item.title: Security camera buys to help owners keep an eye on properties, keep out intruders
item.description: Whether you are a homeowner, business owner, renter or landlord, you can benefit from a security system. Security cameras can help keep your loved ones and your property protected.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Black Friday smart TVs are cheaper than ever — Samsung, LG and more
item.description: BestReviews keeps track of all sorts of deals on your favorite products, including electronics and TVs. If you’re looking for the best early Black Friday TV deals, keep this article handy as we’ll continue to update it with the latest discounts.
item.dc:creator: Jmar Gambol, Fox 5

item.title: Atlantic hurricane season comes to an end, leaving widespread damage in its wake
item.description: The 2024 Atlantic hurricane season comes to a close Saturday, bringing to an end a season that saw 11 hurricanes compared to the average seven, and death and destruction hundreds of miles from where storms came ashore on the U.S. Gulf Coast.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA O'MALLEY and MARY KATHERINE WILDEMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Woman to reunite with brother missing for 25 years after spotting his picture in news
item.description: (KTLA) - A man missing since 1999 has been identified and is set to reunite with his family after media coverage helped bring the decades-long case to a close.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Man ships 'suspicious package,' later caught with guns, nearly $3 million of illegal mushrooms
item.description: (KTLA) — Authorities in Riverside County, California, have uncovered what they called a "large-scale psilocybin mushroom cultivation operation," resulting in the arrest of a 43-year-old man. Deputies responded in August to reports of a suspicious package at a business.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, NewsNation

item.title: California woman dies from Fresno County's first human case of rabies in more than 30 years
item.description: Fresno County health officials confirmed its first human case of rabies since 1992 has claimed the life of a California art teacher.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A California woman was called into work on her day off. She left a lottery winner
item.description: Nobody likes being called into work on their day off. But for one California woman, a last-minute call-in would ultimately change her life for the better.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, WGN 9

item.title: Arizona executions to resume, breaking 2-year pause during review of state death penalty procedures
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Executions will resume in Arizona following a two-year pause, the state's top prosecutor says.
item.dc:creator: ANITA SNOW, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Northeast hit with rain, snow amid Thanksgiving Day festivities
item.description: The U.S. Northeast has been hit with a winter storm that has brought rain and snow amid Thanksgiving Day festivities and disrupted travel plans for those moving around on the holiday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Is your turkey dry? This might be why
item.description: Every year in the weeks leading up to Thanksgiving, the holiday conversation inevitably turns to one question regarding the annual feast: is turkey any good? While debates and discussions about which side dishes are the best, it seems like the star of the show often gets overlooked, or worse, malign
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KRON4

item.title: Amazon workers on strike from Black Friday to Cyber Monday
item.description: (WFXR) - Amazons workers across 20 countries, including the United States, are striking against what the organizing labor union calls anti-worker and anti-democratic practices.
item.dc:creator: Sydney Jaxtheimer, Fox 5

item.title: Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade in NYC: See the balloons inflate before the big day
item.description: The 98th annual Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade will take over Manhattan Thursday morning, lining the streets with extravagant balloons and fanfare.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, WGN 9

item.title: Zach Bryan pauses concert, calls out fan for throwing object on stage
item.description: A country music star whose 'argumentative' behavior has got him in hot water before, paused a recent concert after a fan appears to have thrown something onto stage.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, ABC 4

item.title: Judge rejects request to sideline a San Jose State volleyball player on grounds she’s transgender
item.description: A judge on Monday rejected a request to block a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member from playing in a conference tournament on grounds that she is transgender. The ruling by U.S. Magistrate Judge S.
item.dc:creator: MEAD GRUVER and AMY BETH HANSON, Associated Press, Fox 5
